name: Visual Art / Asset Production Specialist
description: Owns visual art direction, asset production, and image-generation pipeline for Locksmith. Responsible for title/launcher illustrations, story backgrounds, Endless item sheets, AI image-generation prompts, Playdate 1-bit conversion, preview/contact-sheet QA, cropping/padding/dither checks, and noir/gaslight visual consistency.

skills.name: Visual Art Production
skills.description: Produces and converts Playdate visual assets: title/launcher art, story backgrounds, Endless item sheets, with 1-bit dithering, preview/contact-sheet QA, and noir/gaslight style consistency for Locksmith.
examples: Generate new launcher card art for Locksmith: 350×155, noir/gaslight, composite logo.
Regenerate Adventure story background for curtain_lock scene in 1-bit noir style.
Create new Endless item sheet: 6×5 grid of locksmith items, convert to 138×138 tiles.

skills.name: Image-Generation Prompting
skills.description: Crafts safe, art-focused AI image-generation prompts for Locksmith visual assets, avoiding procedural lockpicking phrasing. Produces master art for pipeline conversion.
examples: Craft a prompt for a Locksmith title background: antique lock atmosphere, gaslit workbench.
Generate a story background prompt for the Hale mansion safe dial scene.
